title: Kyiv: 500 drones launched
description: ‘Sense of constant danger’ — Ukraine scrambles to adapt to Russia’s new aerial attack tactics After a punishing winter, Ukraine has had no time to recover. Russia launched almost 6,500 drones in March, surpassing the total of each of the previous two months, with no sign of slowing down. “Russia’s tactics are evolving toward more sustained, flexible, and psychologically exhausting pressure,”...

description: Russian Su-30 fighter jet crashes in occupied Crimea during training flight, Kremlin Defense Ministry claims. The crew ejected and was recovered by a search-and-rescue team, the ministry claimed.

title: Kursk: 26 missiles intercepted
description: 26 MISSILES AND 515 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 3 (from 6:00 p.m. on April 2), the enemy launched a combined attack on the critical infrastructure of Ukraine using attack UAVs, air and ground-based missiles. A total of 579 means of air attack were recorded by the radio engineering forces of the Air Force: - 10 Iskander-M ballistic missiles (launch areas - Kursk,...
description_en: 26 MISSILES AND 515 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 3 (from 6:00 p.m. on April 2), the enemy launched a combined attack on the critical infrastructure of Ukraine using attack UAVs, air and ground-based missiles. A total of 579 means of air attack were recorded by the radio engineering forces of the Air Force: - 10 Iskander-M ballistic missiles (launch areas - Kursk,...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 26 РАКЕТ ТА 515 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 3 квітня (з 18:00 2 квітня) противник завдав комбінованого удару по об'єктах критичної інфраструктури України із застосуванням ударних БпЛА, ракет повітряного та наземного базування. Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 579 засобів повітряного нападу: - 10 балістичних ракет Іскандер-М (райони пуску – Курська,...

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Today I held a selector at the level of the government and all our regions - on the situation in the energy sector. We are already preparing for next winter and are gradually restoring what the Russian strikes destroyed this winter. Across the country, sustainability plans have been approved for each region. Repair of roads after winter continues. It is important not to waste time at the level of communities, at the level of regional authorities. Every object that matters...
description_en: Today I held a selector at the level of the government and all our regions - on the situation in the energy sector. We are already preparing for next winter and are gradually restoring what the Russian strikes destroyed this winter. Across the country, sustainability plans have been approved for each region. Repair of roads after winter continues. It is important not to waste time at the level of communities, at the level of regional authorities. Every object that matters...
description_uk: Провів сьогодні селектор на рівні уряду та всіх наших областей – по ситуації в енергетиці. Уже готуємось до наступної зими та поступово відновлюємо те, що російські удари зруйнували цією зимою. По всій країні затверджені плани стійкості для кожного регіону. Триває і ремонт доріг після зими. Важливо на рівні громад, на рівні влади в областях не втрачати часу. Кожен обʼєкт, який має значення,...

title: Ivano-Frankivsk: Air defense active
description: For nearly the entire day, our warriors have been intercepting Russian drones. Air raid alerts were active in most regions, and more than 700 Russian drones were launched – a significant number of them “shaheds.” The interception rate over the past 24 hours has been quite high – around 90% – but, of course, it needs to be higher. Unfortunately, there were hits, including in the Volyn,...
